questions.text: What is the implicit reward function parameterized inside the DPO loss?
options: r(x, y) = beta * log( pi_theta(y | x) / pi_ref(y | x) )
questions.correct_answer: r(x, y) = beta * log( pi_theta(y | x) / pi_ref(y | x) )
questions.explanation: DPO derives from the closed-form relation between the optimal policy and its reference, allowing the log ratio to act as the implicit reward function.
